positive: A stylized, vibrant floral jungle pattern featuring oversized Monstera leaves, tropical hibiscus blossoms, and exotic bird silhouettes. The style is Neo-Art Deco mixed with Pacific Northwest illustration, rendered in bold linework and flat washes of color. Composition is a dense, repeating seamless pattern suitable for textile printing. Color palette: emerald green, sapphire blue, deep magenta, and burnt orange. Lighting is bright, even daylight with minimal shadows, emphasizing clean contrast and graphic appeal. Central focal point is a stylized, large hibiscus bloom framed by curling jungle vines, creating a striking, high-contrast silhouette.
